storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH021_SC004

## Production Intent
A montage-driven sequence designed to visually communicate the passage of time and Carter's rapid skill acquisition. The focus is on integrating the character into the Zodangan military structure through the mastery of Martian aviation technology, specifically emphasizing the unique mechanics of eighth-ray propulsion.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- Zodangan Air-Scouts

## Required Environments
- Zodangan air-fields/training grounds

## Continuity Constraints
- The visual behavior of the eighth-ray propulsion (gravity repulsion effects) must remain consistent across all wide and close-up shots.

## Beat List
- BT001: Carter utilizes a ruse to infiltrate the Zodangan air-scout squadron.
- BT002: Montage sequence: Carter undergoes intensive training in Martian aviation.
- BT003: Close-up study of Carter mastering the mechanics of eighth-ray propulsion controls.
- BT004: Wide shots demonstrating successful flight maneuvers and mastery of gravity repulsion effects.
